releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Bump minor version to force Obsidian to pick up the new update

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- make premium features available to all users without needing a premium license

**Chore**
- upgrade to latest package versions (which includes Svelte 5 support)
- format code with prettier
- remove trailing commas
- use type-only only import
- remove unnecessary svelte tsconfig change in pipeline

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- simplify table columns to just `Name` and `Tags`

**Fix**
- resolve list `Show tags` setting not working
- make `ListItem` render title in full width when `Show tags` is disabled

**Refactor**
- remove `viewOrder` array and add a `order` property to each view

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- add delete option to context menu
- add confirm delete setting
- make feed view a non-premium feature

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**

- reset `SearchSelect` input to selected value on dropdown close

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- remove icon placeholder for grid card cover image
- remove Obsidian status bar when view is open
- move pagination indicator into a status bar when view is open
- remove favorites filter
- remove timestamp filter
- move search filter and sort order button to right side
- increase custom filter groups size
- rename custom filter button to `Configure`
- make search filter toggleable
- add default values to `url`, `image`, and `image-fit` properties
- add created date to sort filter

**Fix**
- Remove leading zero on time when "Yesterday at" is displayed
- Don't replace existing leaf when the explorer view is first opened
- remove extra right padding on `IconButton`

**Refactor**
- rename cover image fit to just `Cover` and `Contain`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- stop invalid tags from appearing on a grid card #292 #314

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

releases.description:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**
- clear social media cache on update for compatibility with new cover image loading system

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- implement new cover image loading system #261 

**Fix**
- cache url's that don't have a social image. This prevents them from making a network request every time the grid card is mounted

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**
- resolve license validation not validating due to a new line character at the end of the data

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**
- place signature at the front of the license key. This allows the first letters of each key to be unique

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Fix**
- use new name for license key in local storage. This prevents key deletion if you upgrade a vault, enter a key, and upgrade a different vault on the same device

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Breaking change
If you bought a license before version 1.36.0, you will need to enter a new license key. You will be sent a new key by email.

## Updates
**Feature**
- update license system to be fully offline and private.

**Fix**
- fix license key sometimes not appearing #274 

**Docs**
- update network section of README

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Feature**
- add sticky groups. This feature reverts the group clicking behavior to only allow one group at a time. To keep a group enabled even when others are clicked, you can mark it as "sticky" by using `Cmd + Click` (on macOS) or `Ctrl + Click` (on Windows/Linux). #99

**Fix**
- reduce log messages on vault startup
